scope: Technical B-only recovery for the exact four V2.11 full10644 clean-attention checkpoints after the generic V2.19 adapter rejected their schema before inference.

existing_inputs.L1: reuse byte-exact 5-fold PASS output; do not recompute
existing_inputs.failed_v2_log: must contain checkpoint_schema_invalid:pvrig_v2_11_full10644_clean_attention_runner_v1 and is hash-bound before B starts

publication_gates: 150000 manifest/output identity rows in exact order
B receipt closes exact four checkpoint hashes/seeds/schema/split
input firewall reports zero truth/teacher/Docking/contact access
graph and L1 hashes remain identical to preflight
canonical GRAPH_L1_B_TERMINAL.json is absent until all gates pass
failure_policy: fail closed; never alter schema profile, model, score, rank, threshold, graph, L1, or old V2 evidence; do not publish terminal on partial B
claim_boundary: Computational dual-receptor Docking-geometry surrogate only; not binding probability, affinity, experimental blocking, Docking Gold, or submission evidence.
